channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NFL Confidential: Execs Make Sense of Rams' Simpson Pick, Draft's Top Steal, More
item.description: Execs analyze Rams' Ty Simpson pick and the draft's biggest steal.

item.title: Carson Hocevar wins Talladega with celebration
item.description: First career Cup victory and a must-see celebration at Talladega.

item.title: 2025-26 NBA playoff odds for first-round series
item.description: Odds and spreads for each first-round NBA playoff series.

item.title: Cobi Jones statue honors USA icon; Reus leads Galaxy win
item.description: Marco Reus scores two goals to rally LA Galaxy to a 2-1 victory.
